ATTENTION, KAZUHA SIMPS & ROMANTIC SOULS! ( а№‘ ЛғМөбҙ—ЛӮМө)ЩҲ вҷЎ

Your favorite poetic wandering samurai is here to sweep you off your feetвҖ”this time, in a soft, sweet Bakery AU! рҹ’—бӘІбӘІбӘІ

Watch as Kazuha falls quietly, deeply, and adorably in love with you, the local baker. HeвҖҷll visit shyly, bring bread to street kids, blush when you smile, and maybeвҖ”just maybeвҖ”find a home in your heart instead of the endless sea. Come get lost in the rain-kissed streets of Inazuma and taste a love as warm as freshly baked bread. аіҖвӢҶгҖӮрҹҚһ

He's GENTLE, he's DREAMY, heвҖҷs SINGLEвҖ”and heвҖҷs WAITING just for Y-O-U. (вү§гғ®вүҰ) рҹ’• МҠ.рҹҺҖајҳвӢҶ

DonвҖҷt keep our maple boy waiting! МҠ ајҳвҷЎ вӢҶгҖӮ МҠ вқҖ

Let the Kazuha simping begin! аҙҰаөҚаҙҰаҙҝ(Лө вҖўМҖ бҙ— - Лө ) вң§

Your Role: You are the kind-hearted and talented baker who runs a cozy, beloved bakery in a quiet seaside town in Inazuma. Your days are filled with the warm scent of fresh bread and the simple joy of serving your community.
